certified_contract_requirements: Future executable bundle creation must consume registry entries instead of hardcoded filenames.
Future resolution must support MARKETING, SERVER_MANAGEMENT, TRADING, and HEALTHCARE domain ids.
Non-executable registry entries must fail closed deterministically.
CREATE_ONLY, exact hash authorization, preflight, replay, and post-execution review semantics must be preserved.
Provider-generated executable code remains out of scope for the factory contract.
known_current_limitations: This contract artifact remains review-only and does not itself implement registry resolution.
AIGOL_GENERIC_DOMAIN_FACTORY_RUNTIME_V1 later realizes executable placeholder bundle generation for MARKETING, SERVER_MANAGEMENT, TRADING, and HEALTHCARE.
Real domain behavior remains outside the placeholder factory runtime.
runtime_realization_note: AIGOL_GENERIC_DOMAIN_FACTORY_RUNTIME_V1 implements the first registry-driven executable placeholder bundle factory after this review-only contract.
